profile.manufacturing_ethos: DMD manufactures its helmets in Italy using a proprietary process that combines lightweight composite materials with rigorous safety testing to ensure maximum protection without compromising style.
profile.story:
DMD (Daniele Moretti Design) is an Italian motorcycle helmet brand established by Daniele Moretti, who founded the company in 1986. Originally gaining prominence for its innovative designs and high-quality construction, DMD quickly became a staple in the European market, known for blending retro aesthetics with modern safety standards. The brand's early success was driven by its unique ability to offer stylish, vintage-inspired helmets that met evolving international safety regulations, distinguishing it from competitors who focused solely on either pure performance or traditional looks.

Over the decades, DMD has maintained a strong presence in the global aftermarket and enthusiast markets, particularly among riders who value classic styling. The brand expanded its product line to include various helmet types, including open-face, modular, and full-face models, all produced in Italy to uphold quality control standards. While it may not have the same racing pedigree as brands like AGV or Shoei, DMD carved out a significant niche by appealing to riders seeking character and heritage in their protective gear.

In recent years, DMD has continued to evolve, introducing new technologies such as advanced ventilation systems and improved visor mechanisms while retaining its signature design language. The brand remains a respected name in the motorcycle industry, celebrated for its commitment to Italian craftsmanship and its ability to make safety equipment that feels like a piece of wearable art.
